title: Vizhiye Kathai Ezhuthu Lyrics Urimaikural
stanzas:
Vizhiye Kadhai ezhudhu
kanneeril ezhuthaathe
manjal vaanam
thendral saatchi
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

manjal vaanam
thendral saatchi
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

Vizhiye Kadhai ezhudhu
kanneeril ezhuthaathe
manjal vaanam
thendral saatchi
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

manadhil vadithu vaitha silaigal
adhil mayakkam pirakka
vaitha kalaigal (2)

megangal pol nenjil oadum
vaanathai yaar mooda koodum
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

kovil pen kondathu
deivam kan thandhathu.(2)
poojai yaar seivadhu
indha poovai yaar kolvadhu.

oomai veraedhu baashai
ullathil yedhedho aasai.
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

Vizhiye Kadhai ezhudhu
kanneeril ezhuthaathe
manjal vaanam
thendral saatchi
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

kaalam malarkindradhu
kanavu palikkinradhu
ennathili ennenna thottram
en nenjathil
nee thandha maatram
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

Vizhiye Kadhai ezhudhu
kanneeril ezhuthaathe
manjal vaanam
thendral saatchi
unakkaagave naan vaazhgiren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic feelings.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Urimaikural.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary artists K.J. Yesudas and P. Susheela.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned M.S. Viswanathan.

When was this song released?

This song was released on November 7, 1974.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vizhiye Kathai Ezhuthu, the lyrical beauty unfolds as the protagonists express their heartfelt emotions through poignant verses. The song serves as a backdrop to a significant moment in the movie Urimaikural, where love and longing intertwine. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a cherished classic. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics resonate with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vizhiye Kathai Ezhuthu is a timeless melody that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. The collaboration of legendary voices like K.J. Yesudas and P. Susheela, under the masterful composition of M.S. Viswanathan, creates an enchanting experience. This song from the classic film Urimaikural resonates deeply with anyone who has ever felt the bittersweet pangs of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Don't write the story in your eyes with tears; I live for you in the golden sky and the gentle breeze.
I live for you in the golden sky and the gentle breeze.
Don't write the story in your eyes with tears; I live for you in the golden sky and the gentle breeze.
Some feelings that have settled in the heart give rise to confusion and creativity.
Who can close the sky that runs in the heart like clouds? I live for you.
The temple is built by women, and the gods give their blessings. Who will perform the worship, and who will take this flower?
Silence is a different language, and there is some desire in it. I live for you.
Don't write the story in your eyes with tears; I live for you in the golden sky and the gentle breeze.
The lamp is burning, and the light is shining.
The time is blooming, and dreams are being fulfilled; what is the blessing you have given to my heart? I live for you.
Don't write the story in your eyes with tears; I live for you in the golden sky and the gentle breeze.
